overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along a desert highway shoulder. The scene features Mount Chiliad in the background, moderate traffic with cars and trucks passing by, and transitions from rocky hillsides to coastal views with billboards and small structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway shoulder with mountain backdrop

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the highway shoulder facing oncoming traffic

notable_agents.action: dark sedan overtaking the camera position on the highway

entered.detail: large mountain dominating the background with rocky peaks
steep rocky terrain with sparse scrub vegetation
concrete bridge structure spanning across the water
tall vertical sign with multiple colored panels
low scrub vegetation along the sandy roadside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desert highway with Mount Chiliad visible in the distance. The camera follows a character walking along the asphalt shoulder as vehicles pass by on the right. Rocky hillsides rise on the right while a concrete bridge spans the water visible on the left.

events.description: large weathered billboard becomes visible on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway shoulder as various vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: motorcycle speeding past on the highway

entered.detail: large weathered billboard with faded advertisement panels
expansive body of water visible beyond the sandy shoreline

segments.scene_description: As the character walks forward, the rocky hillsides give way to a more open coastal view. A large billboard appears on the left while the mountain shifts to the right side of the frame. Traffic continues to flow past on the highway, including a motorcycle.

events.description: small building structure becomes visible near the coastline on the left

agents.ego_description: walking past the billboard area toward a small building near the water

notable_agents.action: large semi-truck with trailer driving along the highway

entered.detail: small rectangular concrete building near the water's edge
back of a large highway sign facing the camera

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character approaching a small building near the coastline as the billboard passes out of view behind. The mountain now dominates the right side of the frame while the ocean stretches to the left. Heavy vehicles including trucks continue to pass by on the highway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desert highway that gradually transitions from a rocky hillside environment to an open coastal vista. It begins with the camera trailing a character walking along the asphalt shoulder, with Mount Chiliad visible in the distance and a concrete bridge spanning the water to the left. As the character moves forward, the rocky terrain gives way to an expansive coastal view where a large billboard appears on the left and the mountain shifts toward the right of the frame. The scene then opens further as the billboard recedes, bringing a small building near the coastline into view while the ocean stretches wide to the left. Finally, the camera continues its steady progress as heavy trucks and motorcycles flow past on the highway, with the mountain now dominating the right side of the horizon.
